creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: jgh
Date: Thu Jan  2 08:16:44 2014
New Revision: 338423
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/338423

Log:
  - update to 0.3.8
  - while here convert to staging and drop unneeded declaration of GH_PROJECT
  
  PR:		185397
  Submitted by:	maintainer, ross@rosstimson.com

Modified:
  head/devel/chruby/Makefile
  head/devel/chruby/distinfo

Modified: head/devel/chruby/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/chruby/Makefile	Thu Jan  2 08:10:39 2014	(r338422)
+++ head/devel/chruby/Makefile	Thu Jan  2 08:16:44 2014	(r338423)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	chruby
-PORTVERSION=	0.3.6
+PORTVERSION=	0.3.8
 CATEGORIES=	devel ruby
 MASTER_SITES=	GH
 
@@ -21,18 +21,13 @@ SUB_FILES=	pkg-message
 
 USE_GITHUB=	yes
 GH_ACCOUNT=	postmodern
-GH_PROJECT=	chruby
-GH_COMMIT=	f271d06
+GH_COMMIT=	b529bf2
 GH_TAGNAME=	v${PORTVERSION}
 
 NO_BUILD=	yes
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 do-install:
-	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/bin/chruby-exec ${PREFIX}/bin
-	( cd ${WRKSRC}/share/chruby && ${COPYTREE_BIN} \* ${PREFIX}/share/chruby )
-
-post-install:
-	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
+	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/bin/chruby-exec ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin
+	( cd ${WRKSRC}/share/chruby && ${COPYTREE_BIN} \* ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/share/chruby )
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/devel/chruby/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/chruby/distinfo	Thu Jan  2 08:10:39 2014	(r338422)
+++ head/devel/chruby/distinfo	Thu Jan  2 08:16:44 2014	(r338423)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (chruby-0.3.6.tar.gz) = 9a0d799fd7154583870dc0c11e3e71ec3775efb9a6c0adea16b841d19bc99fea
-SIZE (chruby-0.3.6.tar.gz) = 29825
+SHA256 (chruby-0.3.8.tar.gz) = 6b8ea04353d09c6eabe054d63c31405e13033f0b224dfddb213dd42acb31569f
+SIZE (chruby-0.3.8.tar.gz) = 30876
